<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿四]][[zh:三月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿四]][[zh:三月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月廿四]][[zh:三月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838878]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 24|qq=March 24}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 24''' is the 24th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Daiji|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji|1=Daiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1126|en|1126|WD=Q30114|lt=1126}} {{ill|April 18|en|April 18|WD=Q2521|lt=April 18}}) – The Fudoki ceremony for the gold hall and triple pagoda of 【Chūson-ji|中尊寺】 was held. * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|WD=Q1194415|lt=Bunchi}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1185|en|1185|WD=Q19729|lt=1185}} {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|WD=Q2531|lt=April 25}}) – The Battle of Dan-no-ura took place, leading to the extinction of the Taira clan. * {{ill|Ōnin|en|Ōnin|WD=Q1143903|lt=Ōnin}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1468|en|1468|WD=Q6564|lt=1468}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|WD=Q2519|lt=April 16}}) – At [[Kata Daiseki|堅田大責]], Enryaku-ji burned the town of Kata in Ōmi Province. * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|WD=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1784|en|1784|WD=Q7752|lt=1784}} {{ill|May 13|en|May 13|WD=Q2560|lt=May 13}}) – A young retainer of Tanuma Ittetsu, named Tanuma Itchi, was slain in the palace; he died on the 2nd day of the old month. * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|WD=Q1325317|lt=Kōka}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1847|en|1847|WD=Q7644|lt=1847}} {{ill|May 7|en|May 7|WD=Q2553|lt=May 7}}) – An earthquake struck at Nagano near 【Zenko-ji|善光寺】, with reported casualties of 8,000–12,000. == Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Engi (era)|en|Engi (era)|WD=Q1374325|lt=Engi}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|910|en|910|WD=Q30362|lt=910}} {{ill|May 6|en|May 6|WD=Q2552|lt=May 6}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara Takako|ja|藤原高子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Takako|1=Fujiwara no Takaiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q127411}}, a consort of Emperor Seiwa and mother of Emperor Yōzei (born {{ill|842|en|842|WD=Q24730|lt=842}}). * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|WD=Q1194415|lt=Bunchi}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1185|en|1185|WD=Q19729|lt=1185}} {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|WD=Q2531|lt=April 25}}) – Emperor Andoku (【安徳天皇】), the 81st Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1178|en|1178|WD=Q19696|lt=1178}}). * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|WD=Q1194415|lt=Bunchi}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1185|en|1185|WD=Q19729|lt=1185}} {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|WD=Q2531|lt=April 25}}) – {{ill|Taira no Tokiko|en|Taira no Tokiko|WD=Q3379244|lt=Heiji Toki-shi}}, wife of Taira no Kiyomori and grandmother of Emperor Andoku. * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|WD=Q1194415|lt=Bunchi}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1185|en|1185|WD=Q19729|lt=1185}} {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|WD=Q2531|lt=April 25}}) – {{ill|Taira no Tomomori|en|Taira no Tomomori|WD=Q736706|lt=Taira no Chimisori}}, a military commander and son of Taira no Kiyomori (born {{ill|1152|en|1152|WD=Q19645|lt=1152}}). * {{ill|Kennin|en|Kennin|WD=Q1195433|lt=Kennin}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1201|en|1201|WD=Q5225|lt=1201}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|WD=Q2534|lt=April 28}}) – {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}}, a military commander and governor of Shimōsa (born {{ill|1118|en|1118|WD=Q19539|lt=1118}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 1st year (leap March) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1830|en|1830|WD=Q7576|lt=1830}} {{ill|May 16|en|May 16|WD=Q2574|lt=May 16}}) – {{ill|Ishikawa Masamochi|en|Ishikawa Masamochi|WD=Q6535184|lt=Ishikawa Masamune}}, a Kokugaku scholar (born {{ill|1753|en|1753|WD=Q7621|lt=1753}}).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 24''' is the 24th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Daiji|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji|1=Q10936305|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10936305}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1126|en|1126|qid=Q30114|lt=1126|1=1126}} {{ill|April 18|en|April 18|qid=Q2521|lt=April 18|1=April 18}}) – The Fudoki ceremony for the gold hall and triple pagoda of 【Chūson-ji|中尊寺】 was held. * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|qid=Q1194415|lt=Bunchi|1=Bunji (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1185|en|1185|qid=Q19729|lt=1185|1=1185}} {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|qid=Q2531|lt=April 25|1=April 25}}) – The Battle of Dan-no-ura took place, leading to the extinction of the Taira clan. * {{ill|Ōnin|en|Ōnin|qid=Q1143903|lt=Ōnin|1=Ōnin}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1468|en|1468|qid=Q6564|lt=1468|1=1468}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|qid=Q2519|lt=April 16|1=April 16}}) – At [[Kata Daiseki|堅田大責]], Enryaku-ji burned the town of Kata in Ōmi Province. * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1784|en|1784|qid=Q7752|lt=1784|1=1784}} {{ill|May 13|en|May 13|qid=Q2560|lt=May 13|1=May 13}}) – A young retainer of Tanuma Ittetsu, named Tanuma Itchi, was slain in the palace; he died on the 2nd day of the old month. * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|qid=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1847|en|1847|qid=Q7644|lt=1847|1=1847}} {{ill|May 7|en|May 7|qid=Q2553|lt=May 7|1=May 7}}) – An earthquake struck at Nagano near 【Zenko-ji|善光寺】, with reported casualties of 8,000–12,000. == Births ==
